title: How Daily Meditation Reduces Anxiety
shortText: Just 5 minutes of meditation each morning can rewire your stress response and build lasting calm.

title: Why Journaling Improves Mental Health
shortText: Writing down your thoughts clears mental clutter and builds self-awareness that fuels better habits.

shortText: A daily 30-minute walk boosts mood, focus, and energy — no gym required.

title: The Weekly Review Routine That Works
shortText: High performers review their week every Sunday. Here is the exact system to stay on track.

shortText: Being busy is not the same as being productive. Learn to recognise the trap and break free.

title: Spend Less Time on Your Phone, Live More
shortText: Screen time steals focus and energy. Simple swaps to reclaim hours every day.

title: Yoga for Mental Clarity and Focus
shortText: Yoga is not just stretching — it trains your mind to stay present and your body to handle stress.

shortText: Low self-esteem is learned — and so is confidence. Here is how to rebuild from the ground up.

shortText: Even 20 minutes outside reduces cortisol and restores your capacity for deep focus.

title: What is Cognitive Behavioral Therapy?
shortText: CBT is the most evidence-backed method to change negative thinking patterns for good.
